name: Configure and generate new Patient Timeline Exploration

steps.name: Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772803991807 substantiate-e2e' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
Click getByTestId('modal-dialog').locator('div').locator('span[data-test-element^="item-name-"]').getByText('1772804000828 Any medical claim', { exact: true }).first()
Fill "1772804459804 Patient Timeline Exploration - 1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)" getByTestId('tree-search')

Wait for selector getByTestId(/^item-name/).filter({ hasText: '1772804459804 Patient Timeline Exploration - 1772804045907 Descriptive Cohort (Patients)' }).first().or(getByTestId('empty-list-message'))
